notes: Paths include: 27 manifest commands, 13 meta/error/mode paths, 13 wizard sub-paths, and 13 additional coverage paths.
All 27 manifest commands have at least one test exercising them.
All 13 meta paths (no-args, --help, unknown command, subcommand help, etc.) are covered.
All 13 wizard sub-paths are now covered by the newly-added human-* tests.

Wizard direct-path routing confirmed in src/cli/index.ts (lines 316-326): when noun='human' and verb is not 'shell'/'watch', runWizard is called with action=verb and subAction=rest[0]. The wizard then matches action against menuOptions and prints '→ <label>' to stderr, satisfying the text_contains assertions.

For capture/evolve/verify sub-menus: flowCaptureMenu, flowEvolveMenu, flowVerifyMenu each check subAction directly against their options arrays and branch accordingly — confirmed in src/cli/interactive/wizard.ts.

In non-TTY mode the wizard header always prints to stderr, and the '→ <match.label>' line contains the capitalized action name (Create, Capture, Evolve, Review, Verify), satisfying all text_contains assertions.

human-evolve-pr-path routes to flowEvolveMenu which calls pickSpec (uses first found spec or asks via readline), then for 'pr' branch calls prompts.ask('PR number or URL') — in non-TTY readline resolves to empty string, then specEvolve is called. The flow exits cleanly. Stderr will contain 'Evolve' from the match label print.
human-review-path routes to flowReview which calls pickSpec then reviewCmd. With a spec auto-discovered (specify.spec.yaml is present in cwd), this runs cleanly.

coverage_table.note: args ['human','create'] routes to runWizard({action:'create'}), which prints '→ Create   — create a new contract' to stderr then runs flowCreate. Non-TTY readline resolves all prompts to defaults and exits cleanly.

coverage_table.path: human wizard -> Capture -> From a live URL
coverage_table.note: args ['human','capture','live'] routes to runWizard({action:'capture',subAction:'live'}) → flowCaptureMenu with subAction='live' → flowCaptureLive. Header prints 'Capture' to stderr.

coverage_table.path: human wizard -> Capture -> From existing test code
coverage_table.note: subAction='code' → flowImportTests. Header prints 'Capture' to stderr.

coverage_table.path: human wizard -> Capture -> Generate spec from capture data
coverage_table.note: subAction='generate' → flowGenerate. Header prints 'Capture' to stderr.
subAction='interactive' → flowImprove. Header prints 'Evolve' to stderr.

coverage_table.path: human wizard -> Evolve -> From a PR
coverage_table.note: subAction='pr' → specEvolve with empty PR arg. Header prints 'Evolve' to stderr.

coverage_table.path: human wizard -> Evolve -> From a gap report
coverage_table.note: subAction='report' → flowRefine. Header prints 'Evolve' to stderr.
args ['human','review'] → flowReview. Header prints 'Review' to stderr.

coverage_table.path: human wizard -> Verify -> Against captured data
coverage_table.note: subAction='data' → flowValidate. Header prints 'Verify' to stderr.

coverage_table.path: human wizard -> Verify -> Against a live URL
coverage_table.note: subAction='agent' → flowAgent. Header prints 'Verify' to stderr.
subAction='cli' → cliRun. Header prints 'Verify' to stderr.

coverage_table.path: human wizard -> Verify -> Diff two reports
coverage_table.note: subAction='diff' → flowDiff. Header prints 'Verify' to stderr.
subAction='stats' → flowStats. Header prints 'Verify' to stderr.
